baseUrl.description: Your Jira base URL, e.g. https://your-domain.atlassian.net

assignee.description: Assignee identifier. Interpreted according to assigneeKeyType. Ignored if jql is provided or assigneeKeyType is currentUser.

assigneeKeyType.description: How to interpret the assignee value when building JQL.

jql.description: Optional raw JQL. If provided, it overrides the auto-built JQL.

projectKey.description: Optional project key to filter issues, e.g. ABC

statuses.description: Optional array of status names to include, e.g. ["To Do","In Progress"]

updatedSinceDays.description: Only return issues updated within the last N days, e.g. 30

fields.description: List of fields to fetch. Use ["*all"] to request all fields (may be large).

includeRaw.description: If true, include raw Jira issues in the output (can be large).

maxResults.description: Maximum number of issues to return overall.

pageSize.description: Items per page for Jira API pagination (1-100).

expandChangelog.description: If true, expands changelog for each issue.

verifySsl.description: Verify SSL certificates for HTTPS requests.

orderBy.description: Optional ORDER BY clause for JQL, e.g. "updated DESC"
